raw.raw_text: The save button tooltip is slightly misaligned on the right edge of the Settings page. It overlaps the search icon by a few pixels. Not a big deal but it looks off. Firefox 122 on macOS.

fields.body: The save button tooltip is slightly misaligned on the right edge of the Settings page. It overlaps the search icon by a few pixels. Not a big deal but it looks off. Firefox 122 on macOS.
fields.observed_result: The tooltip is misaligned and overlaps the search icon.
fields.user_impact_hint: Not a big deal but it looks off.

Does not impact functionality or critical paths.
analysis.impact_summary: Minor UI misalignment on Settings page in Firefox 122 on macOS.
analysis.narration: A minor issue was reported regarding a misalignment of the tooltip on the settings page, which overlaps the search icon slightly. This is a cosmetic defect and has been assigned a low severity as it does not affect functionality. The report did not specify the expected result, but the issue is likely to be minor in nature.

severity_upgrades: critical path ['settings_save'] forced floor S2 (was S3)
